theme: Mixer #81 — Morning Person or Night Owl

sentences.english: I do my best work before ten AM.
I can't think clearly before noon, but at midnight I'm full of energy.
sentences.korean: 정오 전에는 생각이 잘 안 되지만 자정에는 에너지가 넘쳐요.

sentences.english: It depends on the day for me.
Sometimes I wake up early feeling great, and other days I can barely get out of bed.
sentences.korean: 일찍 일어나 기분이 좋을 때도 있고 침대에서 겨우 나올 때도 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Mixer #81 — Morning Person or Night Owl
